description: Real-time behavioural security monitor for Windows — ETW-based, no signatures, no external threat feeds.
notes: Watchdog requires Administrator (it opens ETW real-time sessions).
Run it from an ELEVATED terminal: `watchdog`. A normal terminal fails with 'requires elevation' because the Scoop shim does not auto-elevate.
Alternatively launch the 'Watchdog' Start Menu shortcut and accept the UAC prompt.
Unsigned binary: SmartScreen may warn on first run (More info -> Run anyway).
